title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude was used to visualize the cognitive patterns and decision-making of Formula 1 drivers and pit crew in real-time during races. The resulting visualizations were displayed on driver helmets and garage equipment as part of the Pattern of Thought project with Atlassian and Williams F1 Team, debuting at Monaco.
